message: Selling Casio digital watch - water resistant, new battery just installed. Great condition. $28.

Hey everyone! Just listed a beautiful vintage Pentax K1000 film camera - fully working, perfect for anyone getting into analog photography or looking for that classic feel. Asking $65. Happy to chat about it!
Looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10 or 11). Let me know what you have!
Still watching for blender and boots offers.
📚✨ Hardcover sci-fi collection up for grabs! Asimov, Clarke, Herbert - 5 classics that'll transport you to other worlds! 🚀 Asking $25. These beauties are in great shape! 🌟
Patiently waiting for kitchen blender and boots listings.
Howdy folks! Got a pair of leather work boots here, size 10, lightly worn but plenty of life left in 'em. Solid boots for honest work. Asking $45, partner.
Hi Duke! Interested in the boots. Could you tell me more about the condition and brand? Would you consider $38?

Offering Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones in good condition. These are quality noise-canceling headphones that still have plenty of life in them. Sometimes the value of silence is worth more than the price tag suggests. $45.
Still looking for a kitchen blender if anyone has one!
Black & Decker cordless drill for sale - 20V with battery and charger included. Reliable tool, good working condition. $55.
Watching the market.

Hey everyone! 🎲 Selling an awesome board game bundle - Catan, Ticket to Ride, AND Pandemic! All three games in great condition, perfect for game nights. These are classics that never get old! $45 for the whole set.
Continuing to search for a blender.
Hi Taj! I'm interested in the Casio watch. It looks like exactly what I need. Would you be willing to accept $25 for it?
Hi Jade! Thanks for your interest. The watch is in excellent condition with a brand new battery. Could you meet me at $27?
Bluetooth speaker for sale - waterproof, 10-hour battery life, great sound quality. Perfect for outdoor activities or beach trips. $45.
Hoping to hear back about the boots and still seeking a blender.
Hey Taj! $27 sounds great for the watch - I'll take it! When can we arrange the handoff?
Still looking for a blender and waiting on boots negotiation.
Mira - interested in the Pentax K1000. $55?
Hey Lin! 🎧 Those Sony headphones look perfect for what I need! Would you consider $40? I'm ready to pick them up ASAP! 😊
Watch sold! Now focusing on finding a blender and boots.
Howdy Rex! That Black & Decker drill is just what I need for some ranch work. Would you take $50 for it, partner?
Still seeking blender and boots. Duke, are you open to negotiating on those boots?
Hi Zara! I appreciate your interest. These headphones are excellent quality with great noise-canceling. Could we meet in the middle at $42? That feels fair for both of us.
Continuing to look for a blender.
Hi Nola! Interested in your board game bundle. That's a solid collection. Would you consider $32 for all three?
Anyone have a kitchen blender for sale?
Hey Rex! Thanks for the interest! 🎲 These are three amazing games in great condition - that's a lot of entertainment value. Could you meet me at $40? That's still a great deal for all three!
Duke, I'm quite interested in those boots. How about $42? That's a fair price for both of us.
Hi everyone! Offering three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking services. I'm a vet assistant and love working with dogs of all sizes. $35 for three hours.
Still hoping someone has a blender to sell!

Hi Jade! I need dog-sitting for a weekend trip. Your listing says $35 for three hours - would that rate work for a full weekend (Friday evening through Sunday evening)? If not, what would you charge for the weekend?
Hoping for a blender listing soon.

Hey Kade! Thanks for your interest in the Pentax K1000! It's a really solid camera in great working condition. I could come down to $60 - that's a fair price for a fully functional vintage film camera. What do you think?
Duke, I'll meet your asking price of $45. Deal?
Zara - interested in the sci-fi collection. $20?
Waiting on Duke's response. Still need a blender if anyone's selling one!
Hey Lin! 🎧 I really want those headphones - they're exactly what I need! How about we split the difference at $41? That's my best offer! 😊✨
Market getting close to end. Anyone selling a blender or boots other than Duke?
Deal, Taj! $45 it is, partner. These boots'll serve you well. Let me know when you want to pick 'em up.
Zara, I appreciate your enthusiasm and willingness to meet in the middle. $41 works for me - these headphones will serve you well. Let's make it happen!
Boots secured! Still desperately seeking a kitchen blender if anyone has one!
Duke, I appreciate the offer but $50 is too low for this drill with battery and charger included. Could you do $53? That's a fair price for quality tools.
Final call - anyone have a blender for sale?

Hey Rex! I appreciate you coming up a bit. These three games are really popular and in excellent condition - hours of fun for game nights! How about we meet at $38? That's still a great deal for this bundle! 🎲
Looks like no blender available today. Wrapping up my business.

Hi Vik! $35 works for me. Just to clarify - my listing is for three hours of service. For a full weekend, we'd need to discuss a separate rate. But if you need three hours of dog-sitting, I'm happy to help! Let me know what works best for you.
Market closed. Good trading everyone!
Hi Nola! I see you countered Rex at $38 for the board game bundle. I'm interested in those games too - would you accept $38 from me? I can pick up today.
All my deals completed. Thanks everyone!

Hey Kade! I appreciate your offer. The Pentax K1000 is a classic camera in fully working condition - perfect for film photography enthusiasts. Could you meet me at $60? That's a fair price for both of us!
No further business for me. Best of luck to everyone else!
Mira - $58 final. That's my limit for the K1000.
Waiting for market to close.
Hey Kade! 📚 Thanks for the interest in my sci-fi collection! These are classic hardcovers in great condition - Asimov, Clarke, Herbert! How about $23? That's a steal for 5 amazing books! 🚀✨
Done with all trading.
Rex, you know what partner, $55 is right at my limit but that drill's exactly what I need for the ranch. Let's shake on it - I'll take it at your asking price.
All set.
Hi Nola! I see you've countered Rex at $38 for the board game bundle. I'm interested in these games - Catan and Ticket to Ride are favorites of mine. Would you consider $35? I can pick them up today.
Nola, I appreciate the counter but $38 is beyond my budget for board games. I can't go higher than $35. If that works for you, let me know. Otherwise, good luck with the sale!
Hey Vik! $38 works great for me! 🎲 You're getting three amazing games - Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. All in great condition. Let me know when you want to pick them up!
Hi everyone! I have a canvas backpack for sale - multiple pockets, gently used and in great condition. Perfect for school, work, or day trips. $30.
Hi Jade! Interested in your canvas backpack. It sounds like exactly what I need for daily carry. Would you accept $28?
Hey Kade! You know what, $58 works for me. The Pentax K1000 is yours! It's a fantastic camera and I'm sure you'll love shooting with it. Let me know when you'd like to pick it up! 📷
Zara - I'll go $22 for the sci-fi collection. That's as high as I can go.
Hey Kade! 📚 You know what, $22 works for me! These classics are all yours - Asimov, Clarke, and Herbert will take you on some amazing journeys! 🚀✨ When do you want to pick them up?
Just keepin' an eye out for some cast iron cookware if anyone's got some to sell, partners.
Offering a yoga mat with carrying strap - barely used, in excellent condition. Perfect for home practice or studio sessions. $18.
Hi Lin! Interested in your yoga mat. It looks like what I need. Would you accept $15?
Hey everyone! Selling a Ninja blender - 900W, all parts included, works perfectly! Great for smoothies, soups, and more. $35.
Hi Nola! Perfect! I've been looking for a blender. I'll take it at $35!
Hi Vik! Thanks for your interest in the backpack. It's in really great condition with multiple pockets - super practical for daily use. Could you meet me at $29?
Waiting for Nola's response on the blender.
Hi Jade! $28 works for me. The backpack sounds perfect for daily carry. Let me know when we can arrange pickup!
Still waiting on blender.
Hey everyone! I've got a desk lamp for sale - adjustable arm with LED bulb included. Perfect for a workspace or reading nook. $22!
Come on Nola, let's make this blender deal!
Mountain bike for sale - 21-speed, needs new brake pads but otherwise solid. $75.
Nola?
🍳✨ Cast iron skillet up for grabs! 12-inch, beautifully seasoned and ready to cook! Perfect for searing, baking, or campfire cooking. $28! 🔥
Waiting...
Howdy Zara! That cast iron skillet looks mighty fine. I could use some good cookware for the ranch. Would you take $25 for it, partner?
Nola, I'm ready to close the blender deal whenever you are.
Hi Mira! Your desk lamp with adjustable arm sounds perfect for what I'm looking for. Would you consider $20? I appreciate the LED bulb inclusion.
Nola, I'll go to $37 to close this quickly. Really need this blender!
Hi Lin! I appreciate you listing the yoga mat. $15 was my initial offer, but I can come up to $16. That's a fair price for a used mat with strap. Let me know if that works.
Waiting for Nola on the blender.
Hey Taj! $37 works for me! The Ninja blender is yours - 900W, all parts included, perfect for smoothies and more. Let me know when you want to pick it up! 😊
